Home / Lore / Factions / Black Tusk

faction

Black Tusk

An advanced private military faction that sabotages the Division Network, invades Washington and pursues national control through high-end weapons and robotics.

Also known as: Black Tusks

Connectionnot applicable Continuitydivision game universe Canon scopegame canon Verificationsource reviewed Reviewed2026-07-19

The endgame invasion

Black Tusk changes the strategic situation after the initial Washington campaign: the group arrives as an organized invading force rather than another local militia. [1]

Capabilities

Their battlefield identity is built around trained operators, high-end weapons and autonomous or robotic support platforms. [2]

Claim ledger

Every factual statement below must retain at least one traceable source.

  1. confirmed

    The official story recap identifies Black Tusk as a private military group that enters Washington and places the city under siege. [1]

  2. confirmed

    Black Tusk sabotaged the nationwide Division Network as part of a campaign to undermine SHD and seize control of the country. [1]

  3. confirmed

    Ubisoft describes Black Tusk operators as using high-end weapons, turret drones, robotic gun platforms and other advanced armaments. [2]

Related records

  • Strategic Homeland Divisionopposed to
  • Washington, D.C.located at
  • Black Tusk Siege of Washingtonappears in

Sources

  1. [1] The Division 2 – State of the Game Recap: The Story So Far — Ubisoft News (2020-02-05). Accessed 2026-07-19.
  2. [2] Endgame Specializations, Black Tusks, and The Fight to Reclaim DC — Ubisoft (2019-02-04). Accessed 2026-07-19.
Editorial status: Command structure and current seasonal leadership are intentionally deferred pending a later-canon source review.
